message:
fix(func): split UTC offset computation into local-input and UTC-input paths for correct DST handling

The localtime and utc modifiers both called the same
utc_offset_for_jdn() which always interpreted the input JDN as local
time. This produced wrong results for the localtime modifier when
the UTC time and the resulting local time fall in different DST phases.

Split into two distinct functions:
- utc_offset_for_local_jdn: interprets input as local time (for the
  utc modifier, local → UTC conversion)
- utc_offset_for_utc_jdn: interprets input as UTC via
  Utc.from_utc_datetime then converts to Local to get the offset
  (for the localtime modifier, UTC → local conversion)

Rename underlying helpers to utc_offset_for_local_datetime and
utc_offset_for_utc_datetime to match their semantics. Update doc
comments to clarify the directionality of each modifier.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
